name: 仙術救母（能力展示型逆襲）
name_en: Immortal Healing Saves Mother (Power Display Reversal)
description: 母親心臟病發作，所有人束手無策，假千金一方趁機抹黑。女主用仙術瞬間救活母親，同時證明自己的價值，從被嫌棄的鄉下丫頭變成救命恩人。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: I can heal by laying Mom flat on the ground. / I don't feel uncomfortable at all anymore. / My niece really does have some special abilities. / She must be a lucky star sent by heaven to save the Xie family.
